initial_value_prop: Reduce unplanned downtime and maintenance cost with predictive schedules, automated work orders, and parts forecasting tailored for mid-sized fleets.
target_segment: North American SMB and mid-market fleets with 50–500 vehicles in last-mile delivery, field services, and municipal operations
negative_icp: Enterprises over 1,000 vehicles requiring bespoke ERP and union workflows

constraints.security_compliance: SOC2 Type I not yet achieved; customer security reviews block several mid-market deals
constraints.budget: Runway 14 months; prefer ROI-positive bets within 2 quarters
constraints.sales: Average sales cycle 60–90 days; security and data migration are common blockers
constraints.data_migration: CSV import quality issues; historical maintenance records mapping varies widely

primary_jobs_to_be_done: Keep vehicles road-ready at lowest total cost
Plan and track PM schedules across locations
operating_assumptions.offline_needs: Technicians often work in areas with poor connectivity; offline-first mobile is critical

success_criteria_hints.activation_definition: Org completes data import, connects telematics, creates first 10 work orders, and closes at least 3 within 14 days
success_criteria_hints.north_star: Vehicles available for service (%) and cost per mile
